case_title: MARK KHMELNITSKIY VS. CALIFORNIA INSTITUTE OF INTEGRAL STUDIES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,275.00 FILED BY KHMELNITSKIY, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA INSTITUTE OF INTEGRAL STUDIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHMELNITSKIY, MARK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA INSTITUTE OF INTEGRAL STUDIES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CHIP B. GOLDSTEIN--DEAN OF ACADEMIC PLANNING & ADMINISTRATION. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA INSTITUTE OF INTEGRAL STUDIES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2015 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
